requirements.summary: Add client-side status filters (contact + delivery) to RepairsDashboard that combine with the existing open/all toggle, update instantly, and can be reset.
acceptanceCriteria: The Repairs dashboard UI includes a visible filter area above the table (or in the CardHeader/CardContent) that allows filtering by contact status and by delivery status.
Filter options include at minimum: contactStatus = toCall, contactStatus = called, and delivery = not delivered, delivery = delivered (with an 'All' option for each dimension).
Changing any filter updates the list instantly without a backend call (client-side filtering of the already-fetched list).
The existing toggle between open repairs vs all repairs continues to work; filtering is applied on top of whichever dataset is currently selected.
A single action is provided to clear/reset filters back to showing all statuses for the current dataset selection.
When filters result in zero matching items, the empty state is shown (and reflects the current dataset selection and filters).

file_operations.description: Introduce shared types and a small pure helper to filter a RepairRecord[] by (a) contact status: all/toCall/called and (b) delivery status: all/delivered/notDelivered, returning the filtered list for use in the dashboard.

Add a compact filter section in the Repairs dashboard CardHeader/CardContent using existing shadcn-ui components (e.g., Button, Badge, Card layout) to control contactStatus and deliveryStatus filters (each with an All option) plus a single Reset/Clear action; apply filtering client-side on top of the currently selected dataset (open vs all) to update table rows immediately; ensure empty-state rendering uses the filtered list and messaging reflects current toggle + active filters. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
